etymology.description: Depicts a container filled to the brim
etymology.interpretation: 畐(fú) represents a container filled to its capacity, illustrating the concept of fullness. It is a pictogram showing a vessel with its contents, emphasizing the idea of being complete. Although it serves as a phonetic component in other characters like 幅(幅) (fú, "width") with 巾(巾) (jīn, "cloth") as the semantic element.
